footer.descripcion: We promote compliance with international human rights standards through strategic litigation, technical cooperation, and academic training.
footer.sugef_texto: "The public is warned that the International Institute for Social Responsibility and Human Rights Association is supervised only in matters of prevention of money laundering, terrorist financing, and financing of the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction, and is also subject to binding provisions of the Financial Intelligence Unit of the Costa Rican Drug Institute. Therefore, SUGEF does not financially supervise the Association, nor the businesses it offers, nor its security, stability, or solvency."

home.hero_subtitulo: We promote compliance with international standards through citizen and government participation.
home.que_hacemos_titulo: What do we do at IIRESODH?
home.que_hacemos_subtitulo: We combine legal action, technical cooperation, and academic training to generate real impact in society.
home.litigio_desc: Legal defense before international courts to set precedents in the protection of rights.
home.incidencia_desc: Research, impact reports, and strategic litigation documents.
home.formacion_desc: Certifications and academic programs designed for leaders of social change.
home.contacto_subtitulo: We are here to collaborate and answer your questions.
home.msg_error: An error occurred while sending the message.

quienes_somos.header_subtitulo: Defending democracy and human rights from Costa Rica to the world.
quienes_somos.historia_1_pt2: was born in San José, Costa Rica, achieving very rapid growth for broader and better care that today allows us to have working offices in several countries.
quienes_somos.historia_2: Since its creation, it has been an entity with clear objectives for the strengthening, promotion, and protection of human rights, thereby influencing a culture where respect is assumed by companies and public institutions as a form of direct development.
quienes_somos.historia_3: We have cooperation agreements with the CCPR-Centre in Geneva, the Inter-American Commission on Human Rights, the National University of La Plata, and the University Institute of Yucatan. Our staff has extensive experience in the Inter-American and UN universal systems.
quienes_somos.historia_4: Since 2013, we have trained more than 1,500 people in Latin America and Europe. In 2021, we opened the institute of higher university studies (U-IIRESODH) in Mexico to offer specialized master's degrees.
quienes_somos.historia_5: Since 2019, we have implemented cooperation projects aimed at advocacy and strategic litigation in Nicaragua, Venezuela, Costa Rica, and Colombia, with the support of donors such as the Embassies of the United Kingdom and Switzerland, and the UNDP.
quienes_somos.sedes_subtitulo: Hover over the red dots on the map

quienes_somos.mision_texto: To promote respect for and compliance with international human rights standards through strategic litigation and training projects, providing support to the public and private sectors in terms of social responsibility.
quienes_somos.vision_texto: To be an institution that promotes respect and the inclusion of human rights through defense and training strategies, in order to build a democratic and participatory society.
quienes_somos.prin_1_tex: Intrinsic and inalienable value of each person. It requires treating individuals as ends in themselves, guaranteeing a life free from humiliation and based on mutual recognition.
quienes_somos.prin_2_tex: Ensuring the fundamental guarantees that allow living with freedom, justice, and peace. They act as a protective shield against abuse of power and systematic discrimination.
quienes_somos.prin_3_tex: Ensuring that all people have access to the same opportunities, eliminating structural barriers and prejudices to build a fair and equitable society.
quienes_somos.prin_4_tex: Adopting sustainable practices that minimize our ecological footprint, recognizing our interdependence with nature to protect it for future generations.
quienes_somos.prin_5_tex: Acting with integrity, avoiding conflicts of interest and fighting corruption. Fostering a culture of accountability where honesty is the norm.
quienes_somos.prin_6_tex: Integrating all individuals into community life, especially the most vulnerable, breaking down physical, economic, and cultural barriers that prevent participation.
quienes_somos.org_texto_1: The organizational structure of IIRESODH has the Presidency as its highest formal authority figure, to which all internal units are attached.
quienes_somos.org_texto_2: A functional criterion is applied for the structural units and a territorial criterion to reflect our offices in different countries of the world, both subordinate to the Presidency.

equipo.header_subtitulo: The human talent behind the promotion and protection of human rights.

informes.header_subtitulo: Transparency and accountability regarding our management and impact on Human Rights.
informes.parrafo_1: In our commitment to transparency, every year we publish a detailed report summarizing our activities, achievements, impact on strategic litigation, and the financial status of the organization.
informes.parrafo_2: These documents are a pillar of our accountability to donors, partners, and the general public, reflecting the work done in the promotion and defense of human rights in the region.
informes.no_informes_desc: We will be publishing our management reports soon.
